mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notice WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM notice WHERE (target_user_id = #{targetUserId} OR target_user_id IS NULL) AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM notice WHERE target_user_id IS NULL AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND type = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, type, target_user_id, sender_id, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{targetUserId}, #{senderId}, #{status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE notice
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE notice SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notice SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notice SET is_read = 1 WHERE target_user_id = #{targetUserId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE (target_user_id = #{targetUserId} OR target_user_id IS NULL) AND is_read = 0 AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
